name: CARLISLE COMPANIES INC
business: Carlisle Companies Inc. is a leading supplier of innovative building envelope products and solutions for more energy-efficient buildings. It sells through its two segments: Carlisle Construction Materials (CCM) and Carlisle Weatherproofing Technologies (CWT). Most of the Company's revenues and operating income are generated from the construction market.

exposures.sentence: Carlisle is a leading supplier of innovative building envelope products and solutions for more energy-efficient buildings.
CWT produces building envelope solutions that drive energy efficiency and sustainability in commercial and residential applications.
